overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins depicting a character in ancient Egyptian robes jogging through the sunlit streets of Alexandria. The character moves past grand classical buildings with colonnades, market stalls, and statue-lined walkways while approaching a distant ceremonial plaza with obelisks and red-striped columns.

agents.ego_description: jogging steadily along the colonnade of a massive stone library building with tall dark columns

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing near the library entrance
camel rider moving away down the street

entered.detail: massive limestone building with tall dark green columns and decorative friezes
white marble statue of a robed figure on a high stone pedestal
tall date palm trees lining the right side of the avenue
wooden market stall with red fabric canopy displaying hanging goods
tall stone obelisks and honorific columns visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character jogs along the grand colonnade of the Library of Alexandria, passing a marble statue and a red-canopied market stall. The street is paved with uneven cobblestones, and palm trees line the right side while distant obelisks mark the horizon under a clear blue sky.

events.description: passing the market stall and transitioning from the library colonnade to a walled garden path lined with classical statues

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path beside a high stone wall covered in flowering vines and greenery

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow tunic walking in the same direction
camel with rider passing by closely on the right

entered.detail: tall limestone wall covered with green ivy and red flowering plants
row of white marble statues on high pedestals spaced along the wall
classical temple building with columns and green banners

segments.scene_description: Leaving the library behind, the character enters a walled garden walkway where classical statues stand atop an ivy-covered wall. A camel passes closely on the right while pedestrians in colorful tunics walk along the cobblestone path, and a temple structure becomes visible on the right side.

events.description: approaching the avenue of red and white striped ceremonial columns

agents.ego_description: jogging toward the distant obelisks along a ceremonial avenue with increasing architectural grandeur

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians walking ahead toward the plaza
camel rider moving past on the right side

entered.detail: tall cylindrical columns painted with red and white horizontal stripes
open-air pavilion with stone columns and decorative green fabric banners

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wider ceremonial avenue as the character approaches the obelisks. Red and white striped columns line the left side while an ornate temple pavilion stands on the right. The stone wall continues alongside, and the distant obelisks grow larger as the character nears the plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the sunlit streets of Alexandria, transitioning from a grand colonnade into a lush garden walkway and finally opening into a ceremonial plaza. It begins with the character jogging past the marble statues and red-canopied stalls of the Library of Alexandria along a cobblestone street lined with palm trees. As the library recedes, the scene shifts into a walled garden where ivy-covered walls and classical statues frame the path, while a passing camel and pedestrians in colorful tunics add life to the walkway. The path then expands into a wide ceremonial avenue, where the environment opens up to reveal red and white striped columns and an ornate temple pavilion. Finally, the camera pushes forward as the distant obelisks grow larger, leading the character directly toward the heart of the plaza.
